tagline: Databricks now provides built in support for reading Excel files.
what_it_does: Databricks now provides built in support for reading Excel files. You can query Excel files directly using Spark DataFrames without external libraries. Beta This feature is in Beta.
why_it_matters: Reduces operational overhead and unlocks new capabilities for data teams on Databricks.
plain_summary: Databricks now provides built in support for reading Excel files. You can query Excel files directly using Spark DataFrames without external libraries.
key_takeaway: Databricks now provides built in support for reading Excel files.
